---
title: string-format
description: "Enforce configured string constraints."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Enforce configured string constraints. Strider default: no constraints.

## Bad

```go
const identifier = "ABC 123" // violating the configured format
```

## Good

```go
const identifier = "abc-123" // matching the configured format
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only string-format`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
